scenarios.name: baseline — lending + swap + perp widgets all render

expected.notes: No execution; assert defi-lending-widget, defi-swap-widget, defi-perp-short-widget and defi-transfer-widget all mount cleanly.

scenarios.name: loop leg 1 — LEND stETH as collateral on Aave

expected.notes: First deposit into Aave — establishes collateral base for the recursive leverage loop.

scenarios.name: loop leg 2 — BORROW USDC against stETH collateral

expected.notes: Borrow USDC at LTV70 against the pledged stETH — proceeds re-deployed into staking below.

scenarios.name: loop leg 3 — re-SWAP USDC → weETH (deepen leverage loop)

expected.notes: Converts borrowed USDC back to LST, to be re-pledged in a second Aave deposit — completing one recursive loop.

scenarios.name: loop leg 4 — second LEND (deepen leverage, round 2)

expected.notes: Second deposit round deepens the leverage loop — net APY compounds per CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED SSOT.

scenarios.name: health factor and leverage loop metrics visible

expected.notes: Reactive-only — after entering an amount the lending widget exposes Health Factor (current + after) and supply APY.
